chart_type: multi-series line plot with markers at integer years
y_label_format: $X,XXX — parsed by stripping '$' and ',', stored as integer dollar amount
extraction_method: HSV color thresholding per series + line-tracking with cluster-based seed selection + linear interpolation across label-occluded gaps

approx_error_budget.y_value: ~ +/- $200 (1 pixel = $497 of y; centroid within sub-pixel accuracy)
